regime.stance: RISK-ON — widen to Mildly Positive too

definition: leaned-in = sentiment >= 0.5 (+ mildly positive 0.15-0.5 because tape is risk-on), top 8/class, weighted by conviction x momentum

weighting.note: target_weight = (conviction x momentum) normalized to 100% deployable, capped 60%/name. Rising-since-last-read names pull more (double-down); cooling names pull less (scale-out).

LEGACY.narrative: STOCKS: mirror the leaned-in book — buy 3 new (LYV, UDR, KIM), sell 0 cooled/fell-off (—), hold+resize 0; 0% kept in cash to rotate

HARVEST_3.narrative: CRYPTO/VALUABLES: mirror the leaned-in book — buy 0 new (—), sell 0 cooled/fell-off (—), hold+resize 0; 0% kept in cash to rotate

HARVEST_5.narrative: CRYPTO/VALUABLES: mirror the leaned-in book — buy 0 new (—), sell 0 cooled/fell-off (—), hold+resize 0; 0% kept in cash to rotate

law: holdings mirror the weighted leaned-in book each cron read: strengthen -> add, cool/fall-off -> trim/exit, always keep rotation cash. Executor still applies every safety rail; this selects + sizes only, never touches engine/agent logic.
